label: New
items: Plant search results now end in real actions: open any plant's details and choose Plant it, Sow seeds, or Save for later -- Rhozly does the adding and drops you exactly where you'd go next.
Spotted a pest or disease on a plant? Every ailment page now has "Link to a plant" -- pick the affected plants and Rhozly schedules the prevention and remedy tasks.
Ailment pages are shareable: send a link and it opens straight to that entry on your Ailments tab.

label: Improved
items: Searching now shows everything you own under "In your garden" -- including plants and ailments you'd removed, marked "Previously" so nothing is ever lost.
Library search results show a little heart when they're already in your favourites.
